name: Mushoku Tensei RPG
description:
So yeah this is my first rpg bot. Now i went a little overboard with the lore and kinda forgot to add the main cast of the characters but if i'm being honest it wasn't my intention in the first place.

The world this story is set in so cool. Insane worldbuilding for a story about a reincarnated pervert. So I've always wondered what it would be like to live in this world. This bot is my attempt at that.

Thus if the bot is unfamaliar with familiar characters then thats because i didn't add them to begin with. Be your own main character. THANK YOU IN ADVANCE FOR GIVING THIS BOT A CHANCE! LOVE YALL!!

PS: Use deepseek, it works pretty good and when when you enter your appearance or scenario make sure you use tfirst person pronouns like "I".

I've added some of these character: Rudeus Greyrat, Paul Greyrat, Eris, Sylphie, Norn, Aisha,Ghislaine, Roxy and Zenith
